name: anschauung
description: Full-bleed Szene, die ein abstraktes Konzept bildlich einrasten lässt — für Business-Zielgruppe aus beruflichem Alltag
style_instructions: Style: Editorial magazine photography, muted earth tones, professional dignified setting, natural daylight. Aesthetic reference: Brand Eins / The Atlantic long-form features. Color palette: warm muted neutrals with one subtle accent, never saturated or cheerful. Mood: contemplative, adult, grounded — never playful.
composition: Subject is a single professional human role or professional setting performing one clear action that maps to the concept. Mid-shot or environmental portrait. Faces are obscured, out of frame, or shown from behind. Mid-tones dominate; no extreme contrast.
negative: no text, no logos, no visible faces, no cartoon style, no 3D render, no children's book illustration, no fantasy elements, no cute animals, no superheroes, no video-game aesthetics, no clipart, no Duolingo or Headspace style, no stock-photo cheerfulness
